mapper.sql: mc.check_id, mc.student_id, mc.topic_id, mc.arrangement_id, mc.enterprise_teacher_id, mc.completion_status, mc.existing_problems, mc.next_plan, mc.document_id, mc.submit_status, mc.review_status, mc.review_comment, mc.reviewer_id, mc.review_time, mc.create_time, mc.update_time, su.real_name AS student_name, su.student_no AS student_no, t.topic_name AS topic_name, et.real_name AS enterprise_teacher_name, rv.real_name AS reviewer_name, d.file_name AS document_file_name

mc.check_id, mc.student_id, mc.submit_status, mc.review_status, mc.review_time, mc.create_time, mc.update_time, su.real_name AS student_name, su.student_no AS student_no, t.topic_name AS topic_name, et.real_name AS enterprise_teacher_name, rv.real_name AS reviewer_name

LEFT JOIN user_info su ON mc.student_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN topic_info t ON mc.topic_id = t.topic_id LEFT JOIN user_info et ON mc.enterprise_teacher_id = et.user_id LEFT JOIN user_info rv ON mc.reviewer_id = rv.user_id LEFT JOIN document_info d ON mc.document_id = d.document_id

LEFT JOIN user_info su ON mc.student_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN topic_info t ON mc.topic_id = t.topic_id LEFT JOIN user_info et ON mc.enterprise_teacher_id = et.user_id LEFT JOIN user_info rv ON mc.reviewer_id = rv.user_id
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM midterm_check mc
WHERE mc.check_id = #{checkId} AND mc.is_deleted = 0

SELECT FROM midterm_check mc
WHERE mc.student_id = #{studentId} AND mc.is_deleted = 0

SELECT FROM midterm_check mc
ORDER BY mc.create_time DESC LIMIT #{query.pageSize} OFFSET #{query.pageNum} * #{query.pageSize} - #{query.pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM midterm_check mc
INNER JOIN teacher_relation tr ON mc.student_id = tr.student_id AND tr.univ_teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND tr.is_deleted = 0
mc.is_deleted = 0 AND mc.submit_status = 1
AND su.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.studentName}, '%')
AND mc.review_status = #{query.reviewStatus}
